title: Rolson 14584 1200 mm/4ft Aluminium Sash Clamp
features: Spring loaded adjustment that sets foot to desired position quickly and effectively
Acme thread enables fast action tightening of clamp
description: Product Description Whether you see yourself as a general hobbyist, that cannot wait to assemble that new model military boat you’ve had your eye on for some time or becoming more of a DIY handyman, the clamp is just what is needed for the workshop or in the garage, so why not purchase the Rolson 14584 1200mm quick action T-bar clamp.A sash T-bar clamp is best suited for someone that spends a lot of time in their workshop and could use an extra pair of hands. The clamp allows you to place items between the head and feet to apply pressure so that it they are held in place, keeping the item secure and your hands free. This could be just the thing for gluing models or repairing items that need pressure to be applied.The Rolson 14584 1200mm quick action T-bar clamp is manufactured with a bright aluminium bar and a cast iron head and foot, which gives you a light bar but with the strength to exert high pressure from the head and feet. The spring loaded adjustment allows you to set the foot to your desired position of up to 1200mm in length quickly and effectively. The acme thread enables fast action tightening of clamp. Box Contains 1 x 1200mm Aluminium Sash Clamp
